description: Grand Ole Opry members and Grammy nominated, Dailey & Vincent, are among the most respected and celebrated duos in American roots music. With unmatched harmonies, masterful musicianship, and a signature blend of bluegrass, country, and gospel, Jamie Dailey and Darrin Vincent have built a career defined by excellence, authenticity, and heart. In 2026, they reached a major milestone with “Ruby,” a multi-week No. 1 song on the Bluegrass Today chart.
subtitle: USA
title: Dailey & Vincent Concert
